summary: i18n & Multilingual TR/DE/FR Infrastructure Integration Testing - iteration 135. Tested localized routing, hreflang SEO tags, language persistence, backend layout resolve i18n, categories i18n fields, seed defaults, and admin content builder. Backend: 25/27 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All core i18n features working.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 during high load - transient issue
Returns 403 without auth - expected behavior when auth token is required

action_items: Consider making layout_preview=draft test use authenticated request
Admin Content Builder i18n tabs: Tabs appear only for components with translatable props (title, body, text). Code is in place (lines 2874-2909 and 2974-3006 in AdminContentBuilder.js)
critical_code_review_comments: i18n infrastructure is well implemented with I18N_LOCALES=['tr','de','fr'] and isTranslatablePropKey() for detecting translatable properties
Content Builder i18n tabs render correctly for props containing: title, description, label, body, text, headline, subtitle, cta keywords
LanguageContext.js properly handles URL prefix > user pref > Accept-Language priority
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n infrastructure is complete. Root / redirects to /tr. hreflang tags dynamically generated for tr,de,fr,x-default. Language selector in SiteHeader works. localStorage persists 'language' key. Backend /api/site/content-layout/resolve respects Accept-Language and X-URL-Locale headers. Categories API returns *_i18n fields. Admin Content Builder has i18n tabs for translatable string props.
